hero.badge: E tshepilwe ke barekisi ba {shopCount}+ ho pholletsa le Afrika Borwa
hero.title: Rekisa Inthaneteng
hero.subtitle: Fetola kgwebo ya hao ya WhatsApp ya diaparo e be lenane la profeshenale. Laisha setshwantsho — AI e ngola lethathamo. Arolelana ka lenane la hao o fumane di-odara le boholo, mebala le bongata.
hero.aiOffer: Di-listing tse 5 tsa AI TSA MAHALA khoeli e nngwe le e nngwe — ha ho hlokahale karete ya mokitlane
hero.benefitAi: Di-listing tse 5 tsa AI tsa mahala

trustedBy.title: E tshepilwe ke barekisi ho pholletsa le Afrika Borwa

howItWorks.badge: Ho nka metsotso e ka tlase ho mehlano
howItWorks.title: Theha Lebenkele La Hao Inthaneteng Ka Mehato E Meraro
howItWorks.subtitle: Ha ho programming, ha ho ba moralo, ha ho di-platform tse theko e phahameng. Dihlahiswa tsa hao le nomoro ya WhatsApp feela.
howItWorks.step1Title: Nka Setshwantsho → AI E A Se Beha
howItWorks.step1Desc: Laisha setshwantsho sa sehlahiswa mme AI e hlahise sehlooho, tlhaloso, sehlopha le di-tag tsa SEO ka metsotswana e 10. Di-listing tse 5 tsa AI tsa mahala khoeli e nngwe le e nngwe.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Fumana URL ya hao e ikgethileng. E kenye dihlopheng tsa WhatsApp, boemo, Instagram bio, TikTok — hohle moo bareki ba hao ba leng teng.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Bareki ba sheba, ba kgetha dikgetho le bongata, mme ba o romele odara e hlophisitsweng e hlwekileng ho WhatsApp. Le ho latela ha odara ho ahilweng.

features.title: Tsohle Tseo O Di Hlokang Ho Rekisa Inthaneteng Afrika Borwa
features.subtitle: E ahetswe ka mokhwa oo barekisi ba Afrika Borwa ba sebetsang ka teng ka nnete.

whatsapp.title: Di-odara Tse Yang Ho WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Bareki ba kgetha boholo, mebala, le bongata — mme ba o romele odara e le nngwe e hlwekileng ho WhatsApp. Ha ho pherekano.

mobile.title: E Sebetsa Ho Fono Efe Kapa Efe
mobile.description: Ha ho app eo o lokelang ho e laisha. Bareki ba hao ba tobetsa lenane ba shebe. Le ho data e bonya ya mobile — e ntse e laesha kapele.

variants.title: Boholo, Mebala Le Dikgetho
variants.description: Bareki ba kgetha hantle seo ba se batlang — ha e sa le melaetsa ya "ke boholo bofe?". O beha dikgetho, ba a kgetha.

tracking.title: Latela Odara E Nngwe Le E Nngwe
tracking.description: Odara e nngwe le e nngwe e fumana nomoro ya ho latela. Ntjhafatsa boemo ha o ntse o tsamaya: E Emetseng → E Netefalitsweng → E Rometswe → E Fihlile.

analytics.title: Bona Ya Shebang Dihlahiswa Tsa Hao
analytics.description: Tseba hore ke dihlahiswa dife tse fumanang ho bonwa ho hongata, se tobetswang, le se fetolang di-odara tsa WhatsApp ka nnete.

photos.title: Ditshwantsho Tse Laeshang Kapele
photos.description: Laisha ditshwantsho tsa dihlahiswa tsa hao — re di etsa hore di laeshe kapele ho fono efe kapa efe, le ho 3G.

import.title: Laisha Dihlahiswa Tsohle Ka Nako E Le Nngwe
import.description: O na le spreadsheet e nang le dihlahiswa tse 100+? Di laisha kaofela ka metsotswana. Re tla etsa tsohle.

marketplace.title: Fumanwa Ke Bareki Ba Batjha
marketplace.description: Dihlahiswa tsa hao di hlaha mmarakeng wa TradeFeed — dikete tsa bareki ba SA ba shebang letsatsi le leng le le leng. Ho bonwa ha mahala.

notifications.title: O Se Ke Oa Latlheha Thekiso
notifications.description: Fumana tsebiso hang ha o fumana odara, ha setoko se le tlase, kapa ha moreki a siya tlhahlobo.

reviews.title: Ditlhahlobo Tsa Bareki Le Lintlha
reviews.description: Lumella bareki ba thabileng ba o pake. Ditlhahlobo di aha tshepo mme di thuse bareki ba batjha.

verified.title: Baeche Ya Morekisi Ea Netefalitsweng
verified.description: Bonts'a bareki hore o kgwebo ya nnete ka baeche e netefalitsweng. Tshepo = thekiso e ngata.

revenue.title: Tseba Dinomoro Tsa Hao
revenue.description: Bona chelete e kenang letsatsi le leng le le leng, dihlahiswa tse rekiswang haholo, le mekhoa ya kgolo. Tseba hantle se sebetsang.

pricing.title: Qala Mahala. Hodisa Lebenkele La Hao Ha O Se O Lokile.
pricing.subtitle: Ha ho ditefiso tse patilweng, ha ho makgakga. Ntlafatsa feela ha kgwebo ya hao e hola.

freePlan.name: Mahala
freePlan.subtitle: E lokile ho qala
features: ✨ Tlhahiso e 5 ya AI ya mahala

proPlan.name: Pro
proPlan.subtitle: Bakeng sa dikgwebo tse holang
features: Tshehetsro ya WhatsApp — re romele molaetsa ka kotloloho
Laisha dihlahiswa tsohle ka nako e le nngwe
O se ke oa latlheha thekiso — ditsebiso tse potlakang

faq.title: Dipotso Tse Botswang Kgafetsa
faq.subtitle: Tsohle tseo o hlokang ho di tseba pele o qala.

cta.title: O Lokile
cta.subtitle: Laisha setshwantsho, AI e theha lethathamo, arolelana ho WhatsApp. Di-listing tsa hao tse 5 tsa pele tsa AI ke tsa mahala — qala ho rekisa ka metsotso e ka tlase ho meraro.
cta.badge: Kopana le barekisi ba {shopCount}+ ba Afrika Borwa
cta.footer: Di-listing tse 5 tsa AI tsa mahala · Ha ho karete ya mokitlane · Beha ka metsotso e ka tlase ho meraro · Hlakola neng kapa neng

marketplace.title: Mmaraka
marketplace.subtitle: Fumana dihlahiswa ho barekisi ba holimo ba Afrika Borwa

sort.priceAsc: Theko: E Tlase Ho Ya Ho E Hodimo
sort.priceDesc: Theko: E Hodimo Ho Ya Ho E Tlase

marketplace.noResultsHint: Leka ho batla ho fapaneng kapa o fetole difilthara tsa hao.
marketplace.whatsappImportCta: O se o rekisa ho WhatsApp? <link>Kenya khathaloko ya hao ya WhatsApp</link> mme o fumane lebenkele la hao la inthanete ka metsotswana e 30.

catalog.settingUp: {shopName} e ntse e hlophisa lenane la yona. Kgutla haufinyana!
catalog.browseMore: O batla ho bona dihlahiswa ho barekisi ba bang?
catalog.browseMarketplace: Sheba tse ding ho TradeFeed Mmaraka

cart.title: Odara Ya Hao
cart.empty: Karaka ya hao ha e na letho
cart.opensWhatsApp: E bula WhatsApp ka dintlha tsa odara ya hao
cart.name: Lebitso

wishlist.title: Tse Ratwang
wishlist.empty: Ha ho tse ratwang ha jwale
wishlist.emptyHint: Tobetsa setshwantsho sa pelo dihlahisweng tseo o di ratang

contact.title: Ikopanya & Thuso
contact.subtitle: Fumana thuso ka lebenkele la hao, li-odara, kapa akhaonto ya hao.
contact.responseTime: Re ikemiselitse ho araba ka hara dihora tse 24 matsatsing a kgwebo (Mantaha–Labohlano). WhatsApp hangata e fumana karabo ka letsatsi leo.
contact.emailDesc: E molemo bakeng sa mathata a akhaonto, dipotso tsa tefiso, le dipotso tse khethehileng. Re araba ka hara dihora tse 24.
contact.whatsappDesc: Dipotso tse potlakileng? Bua le sehlopha sa rona ho WhatsApp. E fumaneha Mantaha–Labohlano, 8am–5pm SAST.
contact.commonQuestionsDesc: Dikarabo tse potlakileng tsa dipotso tse botswang haholo.
contact.stillNeedHelpDesc: Ha o fumane seo o se batlang? Sehlopha sa rona se thabela ho o thusa.

faq.createShopAnswer: Tobetsa "Qala Ho Rekisa" leqepheng la lehae, ingodise ka imeile ya hao kapa akhaonto ya Google, ebe o latela motataisi. O tla ba le lenane la hao ka tlase ho metsotso e 2.
faq.aiListing: Ho thala ka AI ho sebetsa jwang?
faq.aiListingAnswer: Laela senepe sa sehlahiswa mme AI ya rona e hlahisa sehlooho, tlhalosetso, sehlopha, le theko e kgothaletswang ka bo eona.
faq.paymentsAnswer: Ditefo tsa ngodiso di etswa ka polokelo ke PayFast — mokgwa o tshepehang ka ho fetisisa oa ho lefa oa Afrika Borwa.
faq.ordersAnswer: Ha moreki a tobetsa "Order on WhatsApp", molaetsa o tlatsitsweng esale pele le karolo ya hae o romellwa ho WhatsApp ya hao.
faq.whatsappSafe: Na nomoro ya ka ya WhatsApp e sireletsehile?
faq.whatsappSafeAnswer: E. Nomoro ya hao e sebeliswa feela ho amohela li-odara ka API e amohetsweng ea WhatsApp.
faq.cancelPro: Ke hlakola jwang ngodiso ya Pro?
faq.cancelProAnswer: Eya ho Dashboard → Billing → Cancel Plan. Likarolo tsa hao tsa Pro li tla sebetsa ho fihlela qetellong ea nako ea hao ea tefiso.

onboarding.badge: E nka metsotso e ka tlase ho 2
onboarding.title: Qala
onboarding.subtitle: Fa kgwebo ya hao lenane la webosaete e tshwanelang. Arolelana ho WhatsApp mme o lumelle bareki ho sheba, khetha dikgetho, le ho odara — tsohle di hlophisitswe.
onboarding.feature1: Fumana lenane la khathaloko e arolelwang hang-hang
onboarding.feature2: Bareki ba odara ka WhatsApp — ha ho hlokahale app
onboarding.feature4: Morero oa mahala — ntlafatsa nako efe kapa efe
onboarding.trustedBy: E tshepilwe ke barekisi ba 200+ ba SA

tracking.title: Latela Odara ya Hao
tracking.subtitle: Kenya nomoro ya odara e tswang molaetseng wa hao wa WhatsApp wa netefatso ho hlahloba boemo ba odara ya hao.
tracking.whereToFind: O fumana kae nomoro ya odara ya hao?
tracking.step1: Bula molaetsa oa WhatsApp oo o o rometseng ho morekisi ha o beha odara ya hao.
tracking.step2: Sheba nomoro ya odara ka holimo ho molaetsa.
tracking.step3: Manamela ka holimo ebe o tobetsa Latela ho bona boemo ba morao-rao.

orders.noOrdersYet: Ha o so ka o beha li-odara.
orders.startShopping: Qala ho reka mmarak eng ho bona li-odara tsa hao mona.
orders.signInPrompt: Kena ho bona li-odara tsohle tsa hao sebakeng se le seng, latela diphano, le ho odara hape lintho tse ratwang.
orders.haveOrderNumber: Na o na le nomoro ya odara?
orders.trackByNumber: Latela odara e itseng o sebelisa nomoro e tswang netefatsong ya hao ya WhatsApp.

errors.somethingWrong: Ho na le se sa tsamayang hantle
errors.unexpectedError: Ho etsahetse phoso e sa lebellwang. Sehlopha sa rona se tsebisitswe.
errors.pageNotFoundDesc: Leqephe leo o le batlang ha le yo kapa le sutheselitswe.
errors.offlineDesc: Hlahloba khokahanyo ya hao ya inthanete mme o leke hape. Karaka ya hao le tse ratwang di bolokilwe.
errors.loadShedding: Ho kgaolwa ha motlakase? Data ya hao e bolokehile.

footer.tagline: Dinane tse hlophisitsweng bakeng sa barekisi ba SA
